sections.instruction: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which column of the bar chart represents the figures quoted?
According to the speaker, the main cause of back pain in women is
As treatment for back pain the Clinic mainly recommends
The back is different from other parts of the body because
options: A it is usually better at self-repair.
B a back injury is usually more painful.
C its response to injury often results in more damage.
A for a maximum of two days.
C for pain lasting more than two days.
A is a major source of back pain.
C reduces the effectiveness of exercise.
